name: Peach Melba Layer Cake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix peach fruit spread with 2 tablespoons warm water. This mixture can be used as a substitute for the pourable fruit.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease and flour two 8-inch round cake pans.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
4. Beat softened butter at medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Blend in egg yolks and vanilla.
6. Alternately add dry ingredients and apple juice concentrate, beating well after each addition.
7. Spread evenly into prepared pans.
8. Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown and a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool for 10 minutes in the pans on wire racks.
10. Remove from pans and cool completely.
11. Drain peaches.
12. Combine peaches, raspberries, and pourable fruit; mix lightly.
13. Spread fruit spread evenly over one cake layer and top with the second cake layer.
14. Spoon fruit mixture over the top of the cake, allowing excess to drip down the sides.
